\caption{Canonical violation rate and exact WST-region posterior probability. $K$ is the block count of the \texttt{minVI} partition. The violation column reports the weighted fraction of cross-block edge mass running against the displayed block order, with the absolute backward/cross-block counts in parentheses. The last column is computed only from the unconstrained DC--SBM posterior and is printed on the DC--SBM row: after relabelling each draw by block strength and conditioning on the displayed $K$, it is the posterior probability that all upper-triangular directional probabilities satisfy WST.}
